steps.title: Isolate $x^2$
steps.content: Start with $$8x^2-40=32.$$ Add $40$ to both sides: $$8x^2=72.$$ Divide by $8$: $$x^2=9.$$

steps.title: Take the square root
steps.content: $$x=3 \quad \text{or} \quad x=-3.$$ The problem asks for the positive solution, so use $x=3$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is correct. Choice B solves a different equation, choice C is $x^2$ rather than $x$, and choice D comes from not dividing by $8$.
